user_query: I just noticed Day 2 has no breakfast, my first meeting is at 9am and I'll be starving. Add a quick hotel breakfast before the meeting.

fields.name: Hotel Breakfast Buffet
fields.description: A quick and convenient breakfast at the hotel restaurant to fuel up before the workday begins.

insertion_point.reasoning: The user requested breakfast before their 9:00 AM meeting. Position 0 places this at the start of Day 2, and the 7:30-8:30 AM window allows time for travel to the TD Tower.
